meta.name: QC, filter & cluster (raw counts)
meta.description: Compute QC metrics, drop low-quality cells and rare genes, then normalize and cluster. For unprocessed data.
meta.provenance: Standard scanpy QC-to-clustering path; targets unprocessed raw-count data such as Xenium.

readme: Computes QC metrics, filters low-quality cells (fewer than `min_genes` genes) and rare genes (seen in fewer than `min_cells` cells), then runs the same normalize → log1p → PCA → neighbors → Leiden path as 'Preprocess & cluster (raw counts)'.

params.name: min_genes
params.tooltip: drop cells expressing fewer than this many genes

params.name: min_cells
params.tooltip: drop genes detected in fewer than this many cells

params.name: resolution
params.tooltip: Leiden resolution: higher = more, smaller clusters
